aids.title: The Paperclip Chain
aids.content: Imagine a chain of paperclips where each clip has the serial number of the previous clip written on it. If you replace one clip, its serial number changes, and the next clip's reference becomes invalid. You'd have to replace ALL subsequent clips - which everyone would notice!

aids.title: Block = Head + Body
aids.content:
**HEAD**: The thinker - metadata, hashes, timestamps
**BODY**: The worker - actual transaction data

Just like humans: head thinks, body does the work!

aids.title: Genesis = Beginning
aids.content:
Genesis means 'beginning' or 'origin' (like the Book of Genesis).

Genesis block = The beginning block
- No parent (previous_hash = 0)
- The ancestor of all blocks
- Hardcoded into the software

aids.title: Domino Effect
aids.content:
Tampering = Pushing the first domino

Change Block 5 -> Invalidates Block 6 -> Invalidates Block 7 -> ...

But you need to push ALL dominoes faster than new ones are added!

aids.title: Orphan = Valid but Rejected
aids.content:
Orphan blocks are like:
- Valid job applications that weren't selected
- Good work, just not chosen for the main chain
- Transactions return to 'applicant pool' (mempool)
